name: Brand inference from voice/style document
description: Document explicitly describing how the user writes. Brand inference should capture voice precisely, identify audience.

document_contents.content:
How I write

I write for technical operators — engineering managers, infra leads, platform teams. They're skeptical of marketing language. They're allergic to 'leverage,' 'synergy,' 'unlock.' They want concrete claims with concrete evidence.

I use short sentences. I use the second person. I never use exclamation marks. I lead with the takeaway, then explain. Charts must have axes labeled and units on every value.

I avoid: emojis, excessive bolding, headers that don't earn their place. I cite sources inline, not in footnotes. I write in present tense unless describing a specific historical event.
